MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-08-2006 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Present:
Susan Parkinson, Esq. attorney for plaintiff
Defendant George Shieman, with LSA - Jeffrey Spahm, Esq.
Roll call taken in Dept. 218 before Commissioner Kaplan. Matter assigned to JPT Marte Bassi in Room 303A for settlement.
Matter settles at settlement conference.
Stipulation for Judgment and settlement agreement signed and filed.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-15-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
George Shieman, 399-0704, Defendant in Propria Persona and Moving Party
RULING:
NO ARGUMENT PRESENTED. DEFENDANT APPEARED TO GET CLARIFICATION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT GEORGE SHIEMAN'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT WAS OVERRULED WITH 5 DAYS TO ANSWER FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER. (301/JLW/CK) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-25-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. DEFENDANT GEORGE SHIEMAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT was ordered off calendar. First Amended Complaint was filed on April 11, 2006. (301/JLW) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
